extension.summary: Browse and stream movies from ICC FTP
extension.description: Streams videos directly from ICC FTP server folder structure.

extension.news: v. 1.0.8 "Jubilee Year Update" - 2026-03-31 - **Improved & Fixed**: AnySex, Ashemaletube, AVJoy, Beeg, Fuqer, Hanime, HQPorner, LetMeJerk, LuxureTV, Nudez, OK.xxx, PornHits, PornZog, Rule34Video, SaintPorn, Shameless, Shemalez, SunPorno, SxyPrn, Thumbzilla, Tube8, UFlash, Upornia, Veporn, VikiPorn, VJav, xCafe, XMoviesForYou, YouJizz, YouPorn. - **Playback & Performance**: Improved startup time or stream selection for Nudez, SunPorno, xCafe and YouJizz; added a platform-specific Nudez playback path for Windows and Android. - **Removed**: RealCuckoldSex (domain for sale), TubeDupe (site currently only serves fixed 6-minute clips). - **Validation**: Expanded KVAT full-site regression coverage and completed a broad post-1.0.7 repair pass across the addon. - **10th Anniversary Year**: 2026 continues as AdultHideout's anniversary year, with follow-up stability updates after the 1.0.7 release.
extension.description:

extension.summary: Watch movies from local FTP servers
extension.description: Browse and play movies directly from your specified local IP servers.

extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 3, 29 June 2007
extension.disclaimer: License GPLv3. Software is provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind, either express or implied, including, but not limited to, the implied warranties of fitness for a purpose, or the warranty of non-infringement.

Licence GPLv3. Software je poskytován „tak, jak je“, bez jakékoli záruky, ať výslovné nebo předpokládané, včetně, ale nikoli výhradně, předpokládaných záruk způsobilosti pro určitý účel nebo záruky neporušení práv.
extension.news: Fix to follow website change again

extension.summary: Cumination, the culmination of adult sites on Kodi
extension.description: Cumination, the culmination of adult sites on Kodi
extension.disclaimer: The author does not host or distribute any of the content displayed by this addon. The author does not have any affiliation with the sites offered. Click on About from the contextmenu on each site to check for contact details.
